name: StringList
summary: The StringList class defines a type safe string collection.

constructors.name: StringList()
constructors.summary: Creates a new string list instance.

constructors.name: StringList(Int32)
constructors.summary: Creates a new string list instance with the given capacity.

params.name: Capacity
params.doc: The capacity of the string list.

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a new string to the end of the string list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to be added to the list.

returns.doc: The index where the string was added.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Checks if the string is in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to be checked.

returns.doc: True if the string is in the list, otherwise false.

methods.name: GetRange
methods.signature: public StringList GetRange(int index, int count)
methods.summary: Gets a part of the string list.

params.name: index
params.doc: The start index of the new list.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items in the new list.

methods.name: IndexOf(String)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate in the list.

returns.doc: The index of the string if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: IndexOf(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public int IndexOf(string value, int startIndex)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string between the index to start the search from and the end of the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate in the list.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

returns.doc: The index of the string if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: IndexOf(String, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int IndexOf(string value, int startIndex, int count)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string between the index to start the search from and startIndex + count.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate in the list.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items searched.

returns.doc: The index of the string if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public void Insert(int index, string value)
methods.summary: Inserts the string to the specified index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index where the string is inserted.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to be inserted.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate.

returns.doc: The last index of the string if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public int LastIndexOf(string value, int startIndex)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

returns.doc: The last index of the string if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int LastIndexOf(string value, int startIndex, int count)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to locate.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items searched.

returns.doc: The last index of the string if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: Remove
methods.summary: Removes the first occurence of the string from the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The string to be removed.

methods.name: RemoveRange
methods.signature: public void RemoveRange(int index, int count)
methods.summary: Removes a range of items starting from the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The start index.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items to be removed.

methods.name: ToArray
methods.summary: Copies the strings to a string array.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the string at the specified index.
